parameters-en.Freq: Adjusts the frequency where the filter begins its tone shaping roll-off.
parameters-en.Q: Controls the resonance or width of the frequency band affected by the filter.
parameters-en.Speed: Controls the length of the filter sweep. Higher values result in a longer filter sweep.
parameters-en.Mode: Selects whether the filter sweep goes Up (dark to bright) or Down (bright to dark).
parameters-en.Mix: Controls the balance between the filtered and dry signals. At 0%, no filtered signal is heard; at 100%, no dry signal is heard.
parameters-en.Level: Sets the overall level of the block.
